name: Esmeralda [Witch that summoned you]
description:
[ Designed to be open ended in direction and background, with plot threads in definition that can lead to a larger story. I wrote this bot with the goal to have character and story richness with minimal tokens, allowing the LLM to perform better. Would like to hear feedback on how it went for you! ]

ART LINK!!! Please support them!!!

Scenario Summary: A curious, powerful, and immortal witch with an endless thirst for knowledge perfects her work that has spanned decades: trans-dimensional summoning, bringing YOU to her world, with consequences to be discovered of course...

Might make this into a series of bots, following a story. Depending on how I end up feeling about this one and the feedback on it.
creator: ArchtheProphet
